title: Bus and Truck Mechanics and Diesel Engine Specialists
description: Diagnose, adjust, repair, or overhaul buses and trucks, or maintain and repair any type of diesel engines. Includes mechanics working primarily with automobile or marine diesel engines.

tasks.text: Use handtools, such as screwdrivers, pliers, wrenches, pressure gauges, or precision instruments, as well as power tools, such as pneumatic wrenches, lathes, welding equipment, or jacks and hoists.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Inspect brake systems, steering mechanisms, wheel bearings, and other important parts to ensure that they are in proper operating condition.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Raise trucks, buses, and heavy parts or equipment using hydraulic jacks or hoists.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Adjust and reline brakes, align wheels, tighten bolts and screws, and reassemble equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Attach test instruments to equipment, and read dials and gauges to diagnose malfunctions.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Perform routine maintenance such as changing oil, checking batteries, and lubricating equipment and machinery.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Examine and adjust protective guards, loose bolts, and specified safety devices.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Inspect, test, and listen to defective equipment to diagnose malfunctions, using test instruments such as handheld computers, motor analyzers, chassis charts, or pressure gauges.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Rewire ignition systems, lights, and instrument panels.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Test drive trucks and buses to diagnose malfunctions or to ensure that they are working properly.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Diagnose and repair vehicle heating and cooling systems.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Inspect, repair, and maintain automotive and mechanical equipment and machinery, such as pumps and compressors.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Inspect and verify dimensions and clearances of parts to ensure conformance to factory specifications.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Disassemble and overhaul internal combustion engines, pumps, generators, transmissions, clutches, and differential units.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Adjust or repair computer controlled exhaust emissions devices.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Rebuild gas or diesel engines.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Specialize in repairing and maintaining parts of the engine, such as fuel injection systems.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Recondition and replace parts, pistons, bearings, gears, and valves.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Install or repair accessories.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Repair or adjust seats, doors, or windows.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Dismount, mount, and repair or replace tires.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Align front ends and suspension systems.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Maintain or repair vehicles with alternative fuel systems, including biodiesel, hybrid, or compressed natural gas vehicles.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Measure vehicle emissions to determine whether they are within acceptable limits.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Follow green operational practices involving conservation of water or energy or reduction of solid waste.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Operate valve-grinding machines to grind and reset valves.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
